Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the base image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on a Java 11 runtime would result in runtime errors due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.1.9.RELEASE to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages, causing compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with JDK 21 and modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 11 would result in incorrect bytecode or build failures if strict toolchains are enforced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation dependencies with their Jakarta EE equivalents.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace). Using javax.* packages results in ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SpringDoc OpenAPI dependencies to the Spring Boot 3 compatible version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older SpringDoc versions rely on javax.servlet and are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta Servlet API, causing runtime linkage errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Kotlin Maven plugin and compiler plugins to support Kotlin source compilation in the build.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the Kotlin plugin configured, Kotlin source files in src/main/kotlin will not be compiled, leading to missing class errors at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Kotlin standard library and reflection dependencies required for the application to run.
pom.xml.why_exists: Kotlin code requires the kotlin-stdlib and kotlin-reflect libraries on the classpath; missing them causes NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jackson Kotlin module to enable proper serialization of Kotlin data classes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without jackson-module-kotlin, Jackson may fail to serialize Kotlin data classes correctly (e.g., missing no-arg constructors or private setters), causing runtime serialization errors.
